chapter_title: Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
text:
In this subchapter:

(1) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1233 (H.B. 1548 ), Sec. 41(3), eff. June 14, 2019.

(2) “Golf cart” has the meaning assigned by Section 551.401 (Definition) .

(3) “Motor carrier” has the meaning assigned by Section 643.001 (Definitions) .

(4) “Neighborhood electric vehicle” has the meaning assigned by Section 551.301 (Definition) .

(4-a) “Off-highway vehicle” has the meaning assigned by Section 551A.001 (Definitions) .

(5) “Public highway” has the meaning assigned by Section 502.001 (Definitions) .

(6) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1233 (H.B. 1548 ), Sec. 41(3), eff. June 14, 2019.

(7) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1233 (H.B. 1548 ), Sec. 41(3), eff. June 14, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 551. Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
##### § 551.451 — Definitions

In this subchapter:

    (1) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1233 (H.B. 1548 ), Sec. 41(3), eff. June 14, 2019.

    (2) “Golf cart” has the meaning assigned by Section 551.401 (Definition) .

    (3) “Motor carrier” has the meaning assigned by Section 643.001 (Definitions) .

    (4) “Neighborhood electric vehicle” has the meaning assigned by Section 551.301 (Definition) .

    (4-a) “Off-highway vehicle” has the meaning assigned by Section 551A.001 (Definitions) .

    (5) “Public highway” has the meaning assigned by Section 502.001 (Definitions) .

    (6) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1233 (H.B. 1548 ), Sec. 41(3), eff. June 14, 2019.

    (7) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1233 (H.B. 1548 ), Sec. 41(3), eff. June 14, 2019.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1233 (H.B.1548), Sec. 41(3), eff. June 14, 2019.*
